hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(cpp|h|hpp|cc|cxx|hxx)$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'service/'; then mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/ai_workflow/state" && printf 'AUTO_TRIGGER\n%s\n' "$FILE_PATH" > "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/ai_workflow/state/trigger.flag"; fi
if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/ai_workflow/state/trigger.flag" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "🔍 检测到 C++ 代码变更 (service/)。建议运行 /test-analyze 进行测试影响分析。"}'; fi
